assignment: AT1 - Identify Opportunities for AI Task Automation

section1.title: Business Overview
section1.content:
"BlueBush" is an Eco-Friendly company that is dedicated to selling only products that tick the eco-friendly box. This covers are large range of bespoke homeware products. Premium sustainable Australian homewares. Ethically sourced, beautifully crafted, built to last.

They are an online only store, adding further sustainability to their business. Therefore, they are an online e-commerce business offering direct-to-consumer products.

The business is small in size only requiring minimal employed people to handle online orders, customer service, stock taking, and order deliveries.


Their Key Values:


  • Sustainability First
  • Community Focused
  • Quality Craftsmanship
  • Transparency

section2.title: Current Business Processes
section2.content:
BlueBush business processes:

  1. Review online orders. (Performed by Staff)
  2. Login to BlueBush Admin site.
  3. Review orders placed by customers.
  4. Confirm payment received.
  5. Confirm allocated stock for fulfilling customers' orders.
  6. If stock is missing, send email to customers providing options going forward.
  7. If stock is available, send order to dispatch team to prepare orders for delivery.
  8. Stocktake. (Performed by Staff)
  9. Review and record all current stock in the warehouse.
  10. Compare warehouse stock levels with online database of stock quantities.
  11. Make note of missing, lost, or stolen stock.
  12. Processing incoming stock and update online database stock levels. (Performed by Staff)
  13. Receive deliveries of stock.
  14. Categorise each stock based on product ID/variant.
  15. Update database with new stock counts.
  16. Create new product stock data for new products to add to the website.
  17. Source stock promotional photography
  18. Develop new product information to populate product webpage.
  19. Login to the Admin portal and add new product information to the database.
  20. Confirm the new product is live and stock levels are accurate.
  21. Preparing Customer Orders for delivery (Performed by Staff)
  22. Receive confirmed customer orders ready for dispatching
  23. Collect ordered items and and package for delivery.
  24. Organise package for delivery based on delivery method requested.
  25. Customer Support (Performed by Staff, facilitated by admin portal and email integration)
  26. Online Website Chat Support
  27. Dedicate person assigned as online chat support.
  28. customer support alerts system they are an available support person.
  29. customer support waits for customers to initiate a customer support request.
  30. When customer initiates customer support chat, the support worker is alerted and begins customer communications.
  31. Support person attempts to answer the customer question, searching their product information, manuals, etc for correct and relevant data.
  32. Direct Phone Call Support
  33. Dedicated support person receives phone call from customer
  34. Customer Support person attempts to answer the customer question, searching their product information, manuals, etc for correct and relevant data.
  35. Email Support
  36. The customer support email sends an alert to customer support that a new customer support inquiry has been made.
  37. A customer support person logs into the admin portal and accepts the customer support request, preventing other from accepting the request.
  38. Customer support reviews the customer's request and creates a response in the admin portal. The admin portal replies to the email and saving the communication trail to the database.

section3.title: AI Automation Opportunities — Identification
section3.content:
Potential AI Automation benefits:

  1. Review online orders.
  2. Review online orders.
  3. Correlate orders made with incoming payments
  4. Confirm allocation of stock for orders.
  5. Provide work orders for staff to gather customer stock, and package ready for delivery.
  6. Prepare shipping labels
  7. Automate delivery pickup requests for sending items
  8. Stocktake.
  9. Mobile device used to scan incoming stock.
  10. Accidental double counting eliminated due to each items unique package ID flags ignore if re-scanned.
  11. Compares previous stock levels and previous orders to maintain balance between incoming/outgoing stock.
  12. AI flags missing/stolen stock.
  13. AI determines potential time windows of missing stock items.
  14. AI logs all delivery data, company names, drivers name, time, date, destination addresses, etc.
  15. Processing incoming stock and update online database stock levels.
  16. AI scans incoming labels from delivery drivers when new stock is received. Confirms product items/quantities for worker to confirm order is correct or is missing items.
  17. AI confirms delivery is ready for storing in warehouse. Sends warehouse request and provides all the items in the delivery, and where in the warehouse each product should be located.
  18. Worker scans each item as they are logged into storage. AI then updates the online stock in the Supabase database.
  19. Preparing Customer Orders for delivery
  20. AI could read incoming orders, confirm that payment has been made, confirms warehouse allocated items are available, automate the process if stock is not available, create work orders for warehouse to fulfill online orders.
  21. Customer Support (Performed by Staff, facilitated by admin portal and email integration)
  22. AI could be used to inject all product information data from where it came from, how it was made, why it is eco-friendly, product specifications, stock levels, estimated delivery time, etc.
  23. AI would be training on LLM for natural language.
  24. AI could be used to manage email responses, social media and online chat communications, and even voice call communications.
  25. A fully trained LLM would speak like a real customer support person, have instant access to all dynamic product information, assist with customer website operations, like how to make orders, make payments, find products, or help with how to use products.
  26. This AI would free up workers time, allowing them the ability to work on other business operations that an AI cannot yet assist with.
